name: Melon & Ginger Basket
recipeIngredient: 2 Kiwifruit, peeled, cut into halves, sliced
8 Black grapes, cut into halves, seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice off one of the rounded sides of the melon (not the pointed ends), so the melon will sit level on a serving plate.
2. To form a handle, make 2 cuts about 3/4 inch wide on either side of a central strip. Continue cutting halfway down the melon, then cut from the bottom of the handle around either side of the fruit so these two wedges can be lifted away to form a basket shape. Cut away the flesh from inside the handle. Remove seeds from the melon.
3. Scoop out the balls with a small melon scoop or cut the flesh into pieces and place in a bowl.
4. Smooth the edge of the melon basket.
5. Add orange juice, stem ginger, syrup, and nutmeg to the melon balls and stir lightly.
6. Add kiwifruit, lychees, strawberries, and grapes and mix lightly.
7. Spoon the mixture into the melon and arrange the fruits attractively.
8. Cover and chill. Garnish with mint sprig, if desired, and serve with ice cream.
VARIATION: Use fresh fruits such as cherries, pineapple, peaches, figs, and nectarines. Substitute freshly squeezed lime juice for orange juice.
